welcome:

💡 Select a product for details
shop_empty: 😔 No products yet. Check back later!
product_no_stock: ❌ Sorry, this product is out of stock.
product_buy_confirm: ✅ Purchase Confirmation 📦 Product: {name} 💰 Price: {price} USDT (~{priceRub} ₽) 💳 Your balance: {balance} USDT 💳 After purchase: {newBalance} USDT Confirm purchase?

❌ Insufficient funds!

💰 Product price: {price} USDT
💳 Your balance: {balance} USDT

Top up balance?
order_created: ✅ Order created! 📋 Order ID: {orderId} 🔄 Status: Pending ⏳ Our operator will contact you shortly.
order_awaiting_token: 📋 Order {orderId} created! 🔑 To activate your ChatGPT subscription, we need your token. How to get token: 1. Log in at chatgpt.com 2. Visit: https://chatgpt.com/api/auth/session 3. Copy all text from the page and send it here ⚠️ Token is valid for a few minutes, send quickly!
token_received: ✅ Token received! Waiting for operator confirmation. 📋 Order: {orderId}
order_completed: 🎉 Your order is complete! 📦 Product: {name} 📋 Order: {orderId} ✅ {result}
order_cancelled: ❌ Order cancelled 📋 Order: {orderId} 💬 Reason: {reason} 💰 Funds returned: {price} USDT
order_failed: ❌ Activation error! 📋 Order: {orderId} 💬 {error} 💰 Funds returned. Please contact support.
topup_enter_amount: 💳 Enter top-up amount in USDT 📌 Minimum: {min} USDT Example: 5
topup_invalid_amount: ❌ Invalid amount. Enter a number greater than {min}.
topup_instructions: 💳 Balance Top-up 💰 Amount: {amount} USDT (~{amountRub} ₽) 📤 Send to address: {wallet} 🌐 Network: {network} 📸 After sending, provide a screenshot or transaction hash for confirmation.
topup_proof_received:
✅ Top-up request received!

💰 Amount: {amount} USDT
📋 Waiting for operator confirmation.
topup_confirmed:
✅ Balance topped up!

💰 Credited: +{amount} USDT (~{amountRub} ₽)
💳 Current balance: {balance} USDT
referral_info: ⭐ Referral Program 🔗 Your link: {link} 🎁 For each invited friend you get {bonus} USDT (~{bonusRub} ₽) 👥 Invited: {count} people 💰 Earned: {earned} USDT
support_text: 🆘 Support If you have any questions or problems, write to us. 👤 An operator will respond shortly.
about_text: 🏪 About Store We sell licensed digital keys and subscriptions at the best prices. ✅ Instant delivery ✅ Quality guarantee ✅ 24/7 support
banned: 🚫 You are banned from this bot.
error: ❌ An error occurred. Please try again later.
orders_empty_active:
✅ No active orders
All your orders are completed. 🎉 Want to make another purchase?
orders_empty_all:
📭 No orders yet
The shop has ChatGPT activations and other products — take a look! 💡 The first order often comes with a discount or bonus.
token_check_intro: Send the contents of /api/auth/session page from your ChatGPT account. We'll verify the token structure and expiration without charging you. This answers: "can I successfully activate a subscription with this token?".
token_check_how_to: 📖 How to get the token: 1️⃣ Log in at chatgpt.com 2️⃣ Open chatgpt.com/api/auth/session 3️⃣ Copy the full page text and send it here
token_check_ready: 🎯 Token is ready for activation. You can place the order — we'll use exactly this token.
tos_intro: Before you start, please review our documents and confirm your consent:
tos_declined:
❌ Without accepting the documents, the bot cannot be used.

You can return and accept at any time — send /start.
tos_required: ⚠️ To use the bot, you must accept the Privacy Policy and Terms of Service. Send /start.
tos_accepted_alert: ✅ Thanks! You can now use the bot.
documents_text: Current documents that govern the use of the shop:
